calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Bruce Lubarsky, clerk Jean Kong, not reported, D525
This cause called for Small Claims Appeal (Trial De Nove). Appellant,Sherie M. Wong appears as pro per; Respondent, Jeannie Sides appears as pro per with witness Marcia Orlando. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Bruce Lubarsky.
Respondent, Jeannie Sides reads her statements in open Court and witness, Marcia Orlando testify on Jeannie Sides behalf.

EXHR (A) PHOTO/STATEMENTS AND VARIOUS DOCUMENTS
EXHA (1) PHOTOS/E-MAILS/LETTERS

10:00am
All newly evidence returned to the parties. Matter is submitted.
